payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Partial, close-up view of a dark leather three-seat couch with tall padded, vertically stitched back cushions and segmented seat panels, visible creasing and a slightly shiny finish; the right armrest shows a built-in control/cupholder area and the object is edge-cropped in frame, approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark leather three-seat couch (partial)","long_description":"Partial, close-up view of a dark leather three-seat couch with tall padded, vertically stitched back cushions and segmented seat panels, visible creasing and a slightly shiny finish; the right armrest shows a built-in control/cupholder area and the object is edge-cropped in frame, approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark leather upholstery","three-seat configuration","vertical stitched cushions","segmented padded seats","shiny finish with creases","right armrest with control/cupholder","edge-cropped / partial"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
